title: Windows Privilege Escalation Notes
description: Windows privesc quick reference: unquoted service paths, AlwaysInstallElevated, token impersonation, SeImpersonatePrivilege and common misconfigs.

title: HTB Chemistry — Easy Linux
description: HackTheBox Chemistry writeup. CIF file parsing RCE via pymatgen CVE-2024-23346, credential reuse and aiohttp path traversal for root.

title: Building a Phishing Infrastructure
description: Red team research on phishing infrastructure: GoPhish setup, domain categorization bypass, evilginx2 for credential harvesting and detection evasion.

title: Useful Burp Suite Extensions
description: Curated list of Burp Suite extensions for web pentesting: ActiveScan++, Autorize, JWT Editor, Turbo Intruder and param miner.

title: Python JWT Attack Tool
description: Python tool to test JWT vulnerabilities: none algorithm, weak secret brute-force, alg confusion and kid injection attacks.

title: HTB Editorial — Easy Linux
description: HackTheBox Editorial writeup. SSRF against an internal API to leak credentials, git log enumeration and sudo python library hijacking.

title: Memory Forensics with Volatility 3
description: Practical memory forensics: Volatility 3 plugins, process injection detection, credential extraction and malware artifacts in RAM dumps.

title: cURL API Testing Notes
description: cURL quick reference for API testing: auth headers, JSON payloads, cookie handling, proxy routing and common pentesting one-liners.

title: HTB PermX — Easy Linux
description: HackTheBox PermX writeup. Chamilo LMS unauthenticated file upload CVE-2023-4220, credential reuse and sudo symlink attack for root.

title: Bash HTTP Parameter Fuzzer
description: Minimal Bash script to fuzz HTTP GET and POST parameters using a wordlist. Detects anomalies by response size and status code.

title: Threat Hunting with Sysmon
description: Threat hunting methodology using Sysmon and Windows Event Logs: lateral movement detection, LOLBins abuse and persistence mechanism hunting.

title: Metasploit Framework Notes
description: Metasploit quick reference: search, use, set, exploit workflow. Post-exploitation modules, meterpreter commands and session management.
